raw_text: david lópez garcía june 23rd, 1993 +34 636153158 / david.logar23@gmail.com madrid, spain profile aerospace engineer and mba. young professional, responsible, committed, sociable and with great capacity to work well under pressure. interested in the aerospace sector. available and open to travel. fluent in spanish and english. creative individual with great problem solving skills and the ability to lead and work with diverse teams. education master in business administration (mba) full time. 10/2017- 07/2018 escuela de organización industrial, madrid (spain) bachelors degree, aerospace engineering major in aerospace vehicles. 09/2011 - 07/2018 universidad politécnica de madrid, madrid (spain) final project: planning of an airline. grade: 9,7. master in decision-making and innovation (online). 05/2018 - present universidad de alcalá, madrid (spain) work experience engineer - production: maintenance repair operations (mro) - retrofit/dass a-400m internship 05/2018 - present airbus defence and space (madrid, spain) internship within the maintenance repair operations department at la muoza (located in madrid-barajas airport) for the a400m retrofit/dass activities. support to the production mro area in the following activities: - analysis of aircraft technical problems and aircraft systems. - support engineers and team leaders in the daily mro activities. - resources and industrial processes optimization. - continuous improvement projects. - coordination with other departments (engineering, quality, manufacturing engineering...). - support practical problem solving (pps) activities. - planning and organizing knowledge transfer in the area. - management of lean panels (sqcdp). shop assistant 02/2017 - 06/2017 caffé nero (london, united kingdom). full time employee during my time in london. administrative assistant 2014 - 05/2018 gestimática s.l. (madrid, spain) part time employee at family owned consultancy business. responsible for introducing accounting records. language additional information spanish: native. driver's license. english: high level. grade 7 gese trinity. additional work experience: french: basic level. - private tutor in math's and physics (2010-2017). experience and knowledge in lean and lean startup. complementary studies soft skille 8 p e a? : how to do business in and with china (50 hours). march 2018 - responsible, punctual and natural leader. fudan university (shangai, china) - capacity to work effectively in groups. - good written and oral skills. technical skills - capacity to work efficiently over long periods of time. pelícano plus, airnav: high level. hobbies: practise sports, travel y read. microsoft office: advanced level. excel: advanced level (course 40 hours, 2018). catia, autocad, nastran, matlab, sap: basic level.
